text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists on OpenReview at the cited URL and was presented as a Spotlight at ICLR 2025. The authors listed in the reference — Jingyang Zhang, Jingwei Sun, Eric Yeats, Yang Ouyang, Martin Kuo, Jianyi Zhang, Hao Frank Yang, and Hai Li — exactly match those confirmed on the author's publication page. The title has a minor capitalization variation ("Improved baseline" vs. "Improved Baseline") but is otherwise identical.
LINK: https://openreview.net/forum?id=ZGkfoufDaU
